sub_modules.gaussian3x3_blur: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian stencil using fixed 1-2-1 separable weights normalized by 16.
sub_modules.high_frequency: Combinational pointwise subtraction computing signed original-minus-blurred detail.
sub_modules.gain_scale: Combinational pointwise signed multiply of detail by runtime gain.
sub_modules.sharpen_reconstruct: Combinational pointwise reconstruction and saturation to the pixel range.
